## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written before implementation and passing
- [ ] `bin/ci` passes locally (tests, linting, security scans)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single change
- [ ] Commit messages use the imperative mood and have no `Co-Authored-By` trailers
